properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v2 v5 v6 v2 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are here together To lift our hearts as one We're in our Father's presence His Spirit is with us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It is good to lift the name of the Lord, our God It is right to give Him thanks and praise For His heart is overflowing with love for us And His mercy, we can never contain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And each and every morning We'll tell of His great love Of all His faithful mercies And all that He has done

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For who can match His kindness And who can count His works Oh, let our praise continue 'Til evening draws in close

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Glory, honour, wisdom, power and strength To our Saviour Jesus, worthy of all praise Oh, glory, honour, wisdom, power and strength To our Saviour Jesus, worthy of all praise (we're before Him) Glory, honour, wisdom, power and strength To our Saviour Jesus, worthy of all praise

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It is good to lift the name of the Lord, our God It is right to give Him thanks and praise (come on) For His heart is overflowing with love for us And His mercy, we can never contain

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: It is right to give Him thanks and praise It is right to give Him thanks and praise Ooh-ooh, yeah
